title: Rig Veda 1.32: Indra Slays the Dragon
description: From the Rig Veda — the oldest scripture in any Indo-European language.
introduction: From the Rig Veda — the oldest scripture in any Indo-European language.

translation.text: I will proclaim the heroic deeds of Indra. He slew the dragon and released the waters. He split open the bellies of the mountains.
